name: Manison #12
description: Al-Sarfah, 'The Changer,' ruled by Mars, represents the positive aspect of change and transformation. Particularly favorable for harvesting the fruits of previous labor and making beneficial life changes. Denebola marks the tail of the Lion, the turning point. The artwork captures this transformative energy with Denebola shining in Mars' crimson-orange palette, with spiraling geometry representing beneficial metamorphosis and the harvest of karmic rewards.

attributes.value: Harvesting crops, collecting debts, making beneficial changes
